roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ATC FOR MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS FILED
/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/INTC/MO GRTD/OR/GTWM//VD: FUTURE DATE OF 06-22-22 FOR TRIAL/CONTD: TRAILING 21001803 & 21002373ON 06-23-22/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 04-02-21 FAILURE TO APPEAR/INTC/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:07-06-22/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITHALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN PREMISESOF RESIDENCE (CURFEW) DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS- 9PM TO 6AM/X:SEE SIGNEDORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO SET JURY TRIAL/SB: 2 HOUR/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/CONTD: PROC RE$500 BW STAY FROM 03-19-21/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT ISORDERED AND STAYED TO04-02-21/X: BAIL SET AT $500/TBH:21002373/
/CAL: TRAILING 21001803 AND 21002373 AND CUSTODY STATUS/INTC/ACM/CONTD:TRAILING 21001803 AND 21002373/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWLIFTT: 03-19-21/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL: 500/BWNUM: 1ST/X: 1 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
